mapper.sql: SELECT ct.coupon_id AS coupon_id, MIN(ct.partner_id) AS partner_id, MAX(p.partner_name) AS partner_name FROM coupon_target ct LEFT JOIN partner p ON p.partner_id = ct.partner_id WHERE ct.partner_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ct.coupon_id
mapper.select: SELECT c.total, c.active, c.platform, c.partner, c.waiting, m.issuedThisMonth, m.usedThisMonth FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.status != 'INACTIVE' AND SYSDATE >= cp.valid_from AND SYSDATE <= cp.valid_until THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = cp.coupon_id AND ct.partner_id IS NULL ) OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct2 WHERE ct2.coupon_id = cp.coupon_id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS platform, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = cp.coupon_id AND ct.partner_id IS NOT NULL ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partner, SUM(CASE WHEN cp.status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting FROM coupon cp ) c, ( SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(issued_at, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') THEN 1 END) AS issuedThisMonth, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'USED' AND TRUNC(issued_at, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') THEN 1 END) AS usedThisMonth FROM member_coupon ) m

where.if: AND c.status != 'INACTIVE' AND SYSDATE >= c.valid_from AND SYSDATE <= c.valid_until

mapper.select:
SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, pts.partner_id AS partnerId, pts.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, c.status AS status, 0 AS issuedCount, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.issue_condition_type AS issueConditionType, c.issue_condition_value AS issueConditionValue FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN (
) pts ON pts.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE c.status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, pts.partner_id AS partnerId, pts.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, CASE WHEN c.status = 'INACTIVE' THEN 'INACTIVE' WHEN SYSDATE < c.valid_from THEN 'SCHEDULED' WHEN SYSDATE > c.valid_until THEN 'EXPIRED' ELSE 'ACTIVE' END AS status, c.issue_condition_type AS issueConditionType, c.issue_condition_value AS issueConditionValue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id) AS issuedCount FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN (
) pts ON pts.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_id, coupon_name, discount_amount, discount_type, max_discount_amount, min_order_amount, platform_share, partner_share, valid_from, valid_until, status, issue_condition_type, issue_condition_value, created_at ) VALUES ( coupon_seq.NEXTVAL, #{couponName}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountType}, #{maxDiscountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minOrderAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{platformShare}, 100 - #{platformShare}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, 'ACTIVE', #{issueConditionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issueConditionValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name = #{req.couponName}, discount_amount = #{req.discountAmount}, discount_type = #{req.discountType}, max_discount_amount = #{req.maxDiscountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, min_order_amount = #{req.minOrderAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, platform_share = #{req.platformShare}, partner_share = 100 - #{req.platformShare}, valid_from = #{req.validFrom}, valid_until = #{req.validUntil}, issue_condition_type = #{req.issueConditionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, issue_condition_value = #{req.issueConditionValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id JOIN member1 m ON mc.member_id = m.member_id
AND mc.status = #{status}
AND c.coupon_name LIKE '%' || #{couponKeyword} || '%'
AND m.login_id LIKE '%' || #{memberKeyword} || '%'
SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName FROM partner WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY partner_name

SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, pts.partner_id AS partnerId, pts.partner_name AS partnerName, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.platform_share AS platformShare, c.partner_share AS partnerShare, c.valid_from AS validFrom, c.valid_until AS validUntil, c.status AS status, c.issue_condition_type AS issueConditionType, c.issue_condition_value AS issueConditionValue, 0 AS issuedCount FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN (
) pts ON pts.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE c.issue_condition_type = #{conditionType} AND c.status != 'INACTIVE' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN c.valid_from AND c.valid_until
SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_coupon ( member_coupon_id, member_id, coupon_id, status, issued_at, expired_at ) SELECT member_coupon_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{couponId}, 'AVAILABLE', SYSDATE, valid_until FROM coupon WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
